description.en: Contracts, proposals, invoicing systems, and communication frameworks designed to protect your freelance income and elevate your business.

painPoints.title: Late or unpaid invoices
painPoints.description: Weak payment terms leave your cashflow exposed and force reactive collection.

painPoints.title: Scope creep loops
painPoints.description: Projects expand while budget stays fixed, quietly eroding your margin.

painPoints.title: Low-authority process
painPoints.description: Inconsistent documents attract difficult clients and reduce close confidence.

title.en: Protect your next project before it starts.
title.km: ការពារគម្រោងបន្ទាប់របស់អ្នក មុនពេលចាប់ផ្តើម

description.en: Deploy ScopeGuard once, then run every client engagement with confidence.
description.km: ដំឡើង ScopeGuard ម្តង ហើយដំណើរការគម្រោងអតិថិជនទាំងអស់ដោយទំនុកចិត្ត។

buttonLabel.km: ទិញឥឡូវនេះ / ចូលប្រើភ្លាមៗ

about.title: Built for freelancers who treat protection as strategy
about.description: ScopeGuard was created to solve the operational weak points that quietly drain freelance businesses.

sections.title: Why we exist
sections.body: Too many freelancers lose income because their client process is improvised. ScopeGuard turns proven legal and operational standards into practical systems.

sections.title: What we solve
sections.body: We solve late payments, scope creep, weak negotiation posture, and inconsistent onboarding with assets built for real client engagements.

sections.title: Mission
sections.body: Help freelancers protect revenue, reduce admin drag, and operate with premium authority.

sections.title: Standard
sections.body: Direct, practical, premium tools that improve business outcomes without fluff.

description.en: Premium freelancer protection systems for stronger contracts, cleaner onboarding, and predictable revenue.
description.km: ប្រព័ន្ធការពារអ្នកសេរីកម្រិតពិសេស សម្រាប់កិច្ចសន្យារឹងមាំ និងចំណូលទៀងទាត់។

headline.km: ទាក់ទងមក ScopeGuard

description.en: Ask product questions, partnership requests, or support inquiries. We reply with clear, practical guidance.
description.km: សួរអំពីផលិតផល ការសហការ ឬជំនួយបច្ចេកទេស។ យើងឆ្លើយតបយ៉ាងច្បាស់លាស់។

responseWindow.km: ១–២ ថ្ងៃធ្វើការ

privacy: We collect information you submit in forms and checkout events required to deliver services.
Data is used for product delivery, support, and security monitoring.
You can request privacy-related support via contact@elevareai.store.
terms: Purchases grant a non-transferable license for internal business use.
ScopeGuard provides documentation resources, not individualized legal counsel.
Terms may be updated periodically; continued use indicates acceptance.
refund: Digital product access is delivered instantly and purchases are generally final.
If files are inaccessible or corrupted, contact us within 7 days for resolution.
All refund support requests must be sent to contact@elevareai.store.
